sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: [{"pathway_id": "resectable_disease", "title": "Resectable Disease", "branching_basis": ["resectability status", "high-risk features", "patient fitness", "molecular profiling"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "No arterial tumor contact (celiac axis, SMA, or CHA); no tumor contact with SMV/PV or ≤180° contact without contour irregularity [PANC-C]", "options": [{"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgery in absence of high-risk features (without neoadjuvant therapy)", "preference": "option", "recommendation": "If patient lacks high-risk features (equivocal/indeterminate imaging, markedly elevated CA 19-9, large primary tumors, large regional lymph nodes, excessive weight loss, extreme pain) [PANC-2A footnote m]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}, {"type": "neoadjuvant_therapy", "label": "Neoadjuvant therapy with or without high-risk features followed by surgery", "preference": "option", "recommendation": "Preferred neoadjuvant regimens include Albumin-bound Paclitaxel/Gemcitabine, FOLFIRINOX or modified FOLFIRINOX [PANC-G 1 of 13]", "linked_regimen_ids": ["nab_paclitaxel_gemcitabine", "folfirinox", "cisplatin_gemcitabine_bral2"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "For patients who did not receive prior neoadjuvant therapy: Capecitabine/Gemcitabine (category 1), modified FOLFIRINOX (category 1) are preferred [PANC-G 2 of 13]. For patients who received prior neoadjuvant therapy, adjuvant options depend on response to neoadjuvant therapy and other clinical considerations. Total duration of systemic therapy is typically 6 months [PANC-5A footnote dd]."}}, {"criteria": "Medically inoperable patient with resectable disease by imaging", "options": [{"type": "non_surgical", "label": "Treat as locally advanced disease", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Refer to locally advanced disease pathway [PANC-2]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Not applicable for medically inoperable patients."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "borderline_resectable_disease", "title": "Borderline Resectable Disease, No Metastases", "branching_basis": ["biopsy status", "resectability status", "treatment response", "molecular profiling"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Biopsy positive for adenocarcinoma, borderline resectable by imaging criteria [PANC-C]. Pancreatic head/uncinate: solid tumor contact with CHA without extension to CA or hepatic artery bifurcation; solid tumor contact with SMA ≤180°. Pancreatic body/tail: solid tumor contact with CA ≤180°. Venous: solid tumor contact with SMV or PV >180°, or ≤180° with contour irregularity or thrombosis [PANC-C]", "options": [{"type": "neoadjuvant_therapy", "label": "Neoadjuvant therapy", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Upfront resection is no longer recommended. Neoadjuvant therapy preferred at or coordinated through high-volume center [PANC-3, PANC-2A footnote n]", "linked_regimen_ids": ["nab_paclitaxel_gemcitabine", "folfirinox", "cisplatin_gemcitabine_bral2", "paxg"]}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "After neoadjuvant therapy and successful resection, adjuvant therapy may be considered based on response to neoadjuvant therapy and clinical factors [PANC-5A footnote dd]."}}, {"criteria": "Biopsy negative or cancer not confirmed", "options": [{"type": "biopsy", "label": "Repeat biopsy (EUS-guided preferred)", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "EUS-guided biopsy preferred. If cancer not confirmed after repeat biopsy, consider referral to high-volume center for evaluation [PANC-3]. If biopsy remains negative after 2-3 attempts, refer to high-volume center [MS-10].", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Not applicable until diagnosis is confirmed."}}]}, {"pathway_id": "neoadjuvant_response", "title": "Treatment Response Following Neoadjuvant Therapy", "branching_basis": ["radiologic response", "CA 19-9 response", "metabolic response", "clinical improvement"], "nodes": [{"criteria": "Significant response: significant reduction of tumor size/volume on CT/MRI (RECIST), significant reduction of CA19-9/CEA, and/or significant reduction of PET SUV/metabolic tumor volume [PANC-D Table 1]", "options": [{"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgical resection recommended", "preference": "preferred", "recommendation": "Independent of degree of vascular involvement if R0 resection is technically feasible. If response warrants resection but technically unfeasible locally, second opinion at center with expertise in vascular resections recommended [PANC-D Table 1]", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": true, "summary": "Consolidative chemoradiation may be considered after chemotherapy and prior to surgical resection [PANC-D Table 1]."}}, {"criteria": "Minimal response: stable or minimal reduction of tumor size/volume, CA19-9, and/or PET SUV [PANC-D Table 1]", "options": [{"type": "surgery", "label": "Surgical resection considered in select cases", "preference": "option", "recommendation": "", "linked_regimen_ids": []}], "adjuvant_logic": {"applies": false, "summary": "Not applicable."}}]}]

nodes.label: Criteria: No arterial tumor contact (celiac axis, SMA, or CHA); no tumor contact with SMV/PV or ≤180° contact without contour irregularity [PANC-C]
Surgery in absence of high-risk features (without neoadjuvant therapy)
Neoadjuvant therapy with or without high-risk features followed by surgery
Criteria: Medically inoperable patient with resectable disease by imaging

edges.label: If patient lacks high-risk features (equivocal/indeterminate imaging, markedly elevated CA 19-9, large primary tumors, large regional lymph nodes, excessive weight loss, extreme pain) [PANC-2A footnote m]
Preferred neoadjuvant regimens include Albumin-bound Paclitaxel/Gemcitabine, FOLFIRINOX or modified FOLFIRINOX [PANC-G 1 of 13]
Refer to locally advanced disease pathway [PANC-2]

nodes.label: Criteria: Biopsy positive for adenocarcinoma, borderline resectable by imaging criteria [PANC-C]
Criteria: Biopsy negative or cancer not confirmed

edges.label: Upfront resection is no longer recommended. Neoadjuvant therapy preferred at or coordinated through high-volume center [PANC-3, PANC-2A footnote n]

EUS-guided biopsy preferred. If cancer not confirmed after repeat biopsy, consider referral to high-volume center for evaluation [PANC-3]. If biopsy remains negative after 2-3 attempts, refer to high-volume center [MS-10].

nodes.label: Criteria: Significant response: significant reduction of tumor size/volume on CT/MRI (RECIST), significant reduction of CA19-9/CEA, and/or significant reduction of PET SUV/metabolic tumor volume [PANC-D Table 1]
Criteria: Minimal response: stable or minimal reduction of tumor size/volume, CA19-9, and/or PET SUV [PANC-D Table 1]
Surgical resection considered in select cases

edges.label: Independent of degree of vascular involvement if R0 resection is technically feasible. If response warrants resection but technically unfeasible locally, second opinion at center with expertise in vascular resections recommended [PANC-D Table 1]
Consider surgery based on clinical factors
